scripts.dev: export NODE_ENV=development && pnpm run build && pnpm run start
scripts.test:alerts-service: node --experimental-strip-types --import 'data:text/javascript,import { register } from "node:module"; import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url"; register("./src/lib/test-loader.mjs", pathToFileURL("./"));' --test src/lib/alerts-service.test.ts
scripts.test:alerts-routes: node --experimental-strip-types --import 'data:text/javascript,import { register } from "node:module"; import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url"; register("./src/lib/test-loader.mjs", pathToFileURL("./"));' --test src/routes/alerts.test.ts
scripts.test:site-devices: node --experimental-strip-types --import 'data:text/javascript,import { register } from "node:module"; import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url"; register("./src/lib/test-loader.mjs", pathToFileURL("./"));' --test src/lib/alerts-service.test.ts src/routes/alerts.test.ts
scripts.test:alerts: pnpm run test:alerts-service && pnpm run test:alerts-routes
